This text uses emojis, which have a dif: This text uses emojis, which have a different byte count.
\"War? No. This is merely a peacekeeping:
"War? No. This is merely a peacekeeping initiative."

Low intensity fighting over the disputed zone. Each side operates from a single forward airbase and must destroy the other's. Aircraft are restricted to counter-insurgency platforms, trainers, helicopters, and transports. No medium or long range air-to-air missiles are available. Air battles are resolved either with guns, or the relatively short ranged IRM-S1.
'Lofting' or 'Toss bombing' refers to re: 'Lofting' or 'Toss bombing' refers to releasing munitions while climbing upward to extend their range. This technique can allow you to throw bombs over terrain features while remaining hidden behind them.
(A temporary auto-save will be created i: (A temporary auto-save will be created if you discard)
20mm cannon firing explosive shells at a: 20mm cannon firing explosive shells at a lower rate of fire than its rotary counterpart.
25kg optically guided submunition packin: 25kg optically guided submunition packing a shaped charge warhead
A 10kg HE warhead housed in a fin-stabil: A 10kg HE warhead housed in a fin-stabilised airframe. Uses canard control for terminal guidance that is provided by an electro-optical seeker head.
A 155mm slug fired from the Dynamo Class: A 155mm slug fired from the Dynamo Class' railgun has the same kinetic energy as a school bus travelling at 500km/h.
A 3kg HE warhead housed in a fin-stabili: A 3kg HE warhead housed in a fin-stabilised airframe. Uses canard control for terminal guidance that is provided by an electro-optical seeker head.
A Fire Control (FC) unit is a truck equi: A Fire Control (FC) unit is a truck equipped with a special command and control post, that links with a nearby radar and distributes target to designated Radar SAM, such as a R9 Stratolance battery.
A GPO-N has a delay fuse that only lasts: A GPO-N has a delay fuse that only lasts for up to 16 seconds, but can create radioactive residue that lasts for years.
A Hexhound equipped with a four-shot IRM: A Hexhound equipped with a four-shot IRM-S1 launcher. Its small profile makes it hard to detect, allowing it to ambush low flying air targets.
A Hexhound equipped with an automatic gr: A Hexhound equipped with an automatic grenade launcher. The grenade launcher is able to rain indirect fire on datalink targets within 2km.
A Laser Air Defence System capable of de: A Laser Air Defence System capable of destroying small calibre aerial munitions.
A Modular Support Vehicle equipped with: A Modular Support Vehicle equipped with a 20mm rotary gun to provide point defence against shells, missiles, bombs, and low flying aircraft.
A Piledriver may cross the Karman line a: A Piledriver may cross the Karman line at the top of its ballistic flight.
A Shard Class Corvette can supply muniti: A Shard Class Corvette can supply munitions to aircraft landing on its deck.
A battle for air superiority fought betw: A battle for air superiority fought between two large airbases, using high-end assets. Rank 3 aircraft available at start.
A campaign of island hopping, in which B:
A campaign of island hopping, in which BDF and PALA fight for control of the Ignus Archipelago.

Your mission is to take and hold the Feldspar International Airport and surrounding smaller airstrips, and to sufficiently degrade the enemy's ability to launch further attacks.

A campaign of island hopping, in which BDF and PALA fight for control of the Ignus Archipelago.Your mission is to take and hold the Feldspar International Airport and surrounding smaller airstrips, and to sufficiently degrade the enemy's ability to launch further attacks.
A combined-arms battle on the eastern ha: A combined-arms battle on the eastern half of the map, limited to smaller aircraft. Each side has one main airbase and one forward airbase, with naval assets watching the flanks.
A compact and advanced multirole fighter: A compact and advanced multirole fighter, the Vortex is capable of operating vertically from small carriers and remaining undetected thanks to outstanding stealth characteristics. While fast, agile, and stealthy when lightly loaded, these characteristics can suffer when carrying a heavy payload of weapons.
A gabion is a large bag filled with eart: A gabion is a large bag filled with earth and rocks, used to quickly build protective walls for firing positions and forward operating bases.
A heavy forward fixed cannon, firing 57m: A heavy forward fixed cannon, firing 57mm multi-purpose warheads at 250rpm. Automatically adjusts fuzing type and timing according to target parameters.
A large, carrier capable, twin engine mu: A large, carrier capable, twin engine multirole fighter, the Ifrit is equally suited to air superiority and ground attack missions. It features excellent thrust and maneuverability alongside reduced radar signature and powerful sensors. Two internal weapon bays can conceal up to 6 missiles or bombs.

A large, carrier capable, twin engine multirole fighter, the Ifrit is equally suited to air superiority and ground attack missions. It features excellent thrust and maneuverability alongside reduced radar signature and powerful sensors. Two internal weapon bays plus two additional side bays for heat-seeking missiles allow the Ifrit to carry a significant internal payload without impacting stealth or top speed.
A lightly armed and armored personnel ca: A lightly armed and armored personnel carrier built on the Modular Support Vehicle chassis
A long press on 'Next View' will open th: A long press on 'Next View' will open the camera control UI, which provides access to several parameters and allows finer control over the camera.
A low-footprint vehicle manufacturing fa: A low-footprint vehicle manufacturing facility, housing an entirely automated production chain. Lighting, heating, and floorspace requirements are only considered for the handful of quality assurance workers overseeing the facility. Factory buildings supply a specific type of vehicle to a faction's inventory.
A missile using a ramjet for beyond visu: A missile using a ramjet for beyond visual range (BVR) engagement.
A pure air & sea battle between two carr: A pure air & sea battle between two carrier groups. Boscali's Annex Class Assault Carrier vs Primeva's Hyperion Class Fleet Carrier, with their respective compliments of aircraft.The first side to sink the other's carrier wins. All 36 carrier aircraft are available immediately, and cannot be replaced easily if shot down. Fly, fight, and land with care.
A reinforced hangar which stores fighter: A reinforced hangar which stores fighter aircraft and a small complement of nuclear warheads. It is resistant to bombs and missiles, often requiring multiple direct hits or large/penetrating munitions to destroy it.
A single use, air transportable 1,500L f: A single use, air transportable 1,500L fuel tank, commonly deployed at Forward Operating Bases.
A single use, air transportable 1500L fu: A single use, air transportable 1500L fuel bladder that can be deployed at Forward Operation Bases.
A small optically guided 125kg bomb, ide: A small optically guided 125kg bomb, ideal for destroying vehicles and small buildings in low level attacks.
A small, remote-controlled, air-transpor: A small, remote-controlled, air-transportable combat engineering unit designed for light role forces. Combat engineering units are able to facilitate the repair and reconstruction of hangars, helipads and vehicle depots.
A surface-launched active radar homing m: A surface-launched active radar homing missile. Uses a combination of inertial guidance and terminal radar homing, and can be fired at aerial targets on datalink from beyond visual range.
A vehicle manufacturing facility, housin: A vehicle manufacturing facility, housing a production line and its associated machinery. Factory buildings supply a specific type of vehicle to a faction's inventory.
A watch tower can be used to guard an ar: A watch tower can be used to guard an area and maintain a military presence in conflict areas, like borders.
AWhen jumping on the map, how fast shoul: AWhen jumping on the map, how fast should the map follow the click
Add AI Aircraft per enemy Player: Add AI Aircraft per enemy Player
Add clicked when there are no options in: Add clicked when there are no options in the dropdown
AddOrRemoveUnit should not be used in ed: AddOrRemoveUnit should not be used in editor
AddOrRemoveUnitEditor should only be use: AddOrRemoveUnitEditor should only be used in editor
Additional laser guidance can be provide: Additional laser guidance can be provided by other friendly aircraft, allowing more targets to be hit per salvo when working cooperatively.
Additionally, you can now hold down a mo: Additionally, you can now hold down a modifier button (Default D-Pad Down) while adjusting throttle, allowing you to manually vector VTOL aircraft without needing a separate axis.
AeroJob could not run because LevelInfo: AeroJob could not run because LevelInfo had no AirDensityChart
After the success of operation Point Bla:
After the success of operation Point Blank, the BDF looks to take ground inside Agrapol and establish a new forward base.

Use the versatile VL-49 Tarantula - first in delivering units to capture a location, and then as a gunship to provide heavy fire support.
Agrapol has a road tunnel leading to its: Agrapol has a road tunnel leading to its central business district. The tunnel is wider than a fighter jet.
Airbase name empty when UnregisterAirbas: Airbase name empty when UnregisterAirbase was called
Airbase support vehicle capable of refue: Airbase support vehicle capable of refueling aircraft parked within 300m
Aircraft not available at this airbase: Aircraft not available at this airbase
Aircraft without a built-in defensive ja: Aircraft without a built-in defensive jammer can take an ECM Pod on an external hardpoint to help defeat radar guided missiles.
AircraftInventoryMenu should not be acti: AircraftInventoryMenu should not be active without a local faction
AircraftInventoryMenu should not be active without a local player
Aligns the origin move to a grid, Origin: Aligns the origin move to a grid, Origin Shift will always be a multiple of this. This helps shaders create stable positions at large scales
All ships Close In Weapon Systems (CIWS): All ships Close In Weapon Systems (CIWS) turrets use the ship's radar to aquire their target and fall back on optical detection when the radar is not available.
Allowing a traverse range from -10 to +1: Allowing a traverse range from -10 to +10 degrees and an elevation range from -20 to +5 degrees, this aimable cannon pod is effective against light armor or aircraft at distances of up to 2000m.
Allows continuous weapon rearmament for: Allows continuous weapon rearmament for ground vehicles and aircraft within 100m. Avoid subjecting the container to large impact forces, as it may detonate.
Almost a quarter of the destructive powe: Almost a quarter of the destructive power of a HE Piledriver comes from its kinetic energy alone.
Already running on main thread, returnin: Already running on main thread, returning result right away
An advanced jet trainer which is well su: An advanced jet trainer which is well suited for light combat duty, the T/A-30 is highly maneuverable at low to medium speeds and possesses forgiving flight characteristics. Particularly adept at low-altitude strike missions, the Compass features redundant control surfaces and twin engines to improve survivability.
An air transportable 10,000L fuel tank t: An air transportable 10,000L fuel tank that can be deployed at Forward Operation Bases.
An air transportable 10,000L fuel tank,: An air transportable 10,000L fuel tank, commonly deployed at Forward Operating Bases.
An air transportable 6,000L fuel tank, c: An air transportable 6,000L fuel tank, commonly deployed at Forward Operating Bases.
An amphibious assault ship which can sup: An amphibious assault ship which can support rotary wing and V/STOL aircraft operations. It has a well deck from which it can launch landing craft, and it can perform shore bombardment with its 76mm cannon and dual-purpose 40mm point defence guns.
An armored personnel carrier upfit for t: An armored personnel carrier upfit for the Linebreaker chassis, this troop transport is well protected with good off-road mobility
An autoloaded 76mm gun, firing fin-stabi: An autoloaded 76mm gun, firing fin-stabilised guided projectiles. The gun requires airflow for cooling. It has a maximum firerate of 60RPM for 10 seconds, and can sustain a constant firerate of at least 40 RPM while moving at 500kph
An elevated, air conditioned chair for a: An elevated, air conditioned chair for a human sentry. Reveals targets within a 5km radius, and will defend itself with small arms fire within a 1km radius.
An enormous, high intensity war of attri:
An enormous, high intensity war of attrition with all airbases active and using all available assets.

Successively more powerful aircraft, and eventually thermonuclear weapons, are unlocked by increasing individual and team point score respectively.

Victory is acheived when all enemy aircraft factories are destroyed and the enemy side's aircraft carrier, which will arrive midway through the battle, is sunk.

An enormous, high intensity war of attrition with all airbases active and using all available assets.Successively more powerful aircraft, and eventually thermonuclear weapons, are unlocked by increasing individual and team point score respectively.

Victory is acheived when all enemy aircraft factories are destroyed and the enemy side's aircraft carrier, which will arrive midway through the battle, is sunk.
An fast firing, autoloaded 57mm gun, fir: An fast firing, autoloaded 57mm gun, firing high velocity unguided shells. When fired against air targets, the shells use a proximity fuse to deal fragmentation damage.
An open stockpile for storing convention: An open stockpile for storing conventional ammunition. Can resupply units within 300m.
An opportunity arises to take possession: An opportunity arises to take possession of a valuable piece of sea mining infrastructure. PALA and BDF try to beat each other to the punch.
Argument offset is out of bounds.
As they have no crew, Unmanned Ground Ve: As they have no crew, Unmanned Ground Vehicles (UGV) can not capture and control locations.

Back to basics with bombs & guns on a CI: Back to basics with bombs & guns on a CI-22 Cricket in a low-intensity engagement.
Blocking side thread until MainThread Ac: Blocking side thread until MainThread Action is done
Bombs have a 4 second arming delay as a: Bombs have a 4 second arming delay as a safety measure to prevent mid-air explosion. Take this into account when dropping them and check the Time of Flight indication on your HUD.
Both the AGM-48 and AGM-68 are capable o: Both the AGM-48 and AGM-68 are capable of lock on after launch, and can be fired from behind terrain.
Both the Hyperion-class aircraft carrier: Both the Hyperion-class aircraft carrier and Annex-class aircraft carrier can store nuclear warheads in their ammunition storage.
Bristling with air defense weapons, the: Bristling with air defense weapons, the Argus class is a missile frigate designed to protect valuable assets from air attack. Capable of locking down airspace in a wide radius, it is an essential component of BDF naval doctrine. The Argus class is fitted with the NL-98 active radar homing missile, capable of engaging datalinked targets at beyond visual ranges.

Combining vertical lift capability with: Combining vertical lift capability with a 20 ton cargo capacity, this large quad tiltwing can deliver crucial supplies to forward positions or serve as a versatile gunship. Its 4 proprotors are linked by internal driveshafts, allowing the Tarantula to continue flying after absorbing significant damage.
Command vehicle capable of distributing: Command vehicle capable of distributing targets from a radar to individual SAM launchers in a battery
Compact and maneuverable short-range hea: Compact and maneuverable short-range heat seeking missile, ideal for defensive anti-air use

Designed for a PALA fast vertical lift p: Designed for a PALA fast vertical lift program in the 2050s, the UH-90 was conceptualized as a medium-sized compound utility helicopter, but has since been fitted with numerous weapon stations allowing it to occupy a gunship role. Featuring a coaxial rigid rotor system and two reversible turbine-electric ducted fans in pusher configuration, the Ibis can rapidly reach high cruising speeds before decelerating to a vertical landing in less than 30 seconds.
Designed for counter insurgency operatio: Designed for counter insurgency operations and low-intensity battlefields, the CI-22 Cricket features robust landing gear and short takeoff and landing capability, allowing it to operate from unprepared fields. While lacking in speed and survivability, the CI-22 possesses remarkable agility and the ability to mount an array of weapon types

Designed for counter insurgency operations and low-intensity battlefields, the CI-22 Cricket features robust landing gear and short takeoff and landing capability, allowing it to operate from unprepared fields. While lacking in speed and survivability, the CI-22 possesses remarkable agility and the ability to mount an array of weapon types.
Designed for long-range precision strike: Designed for long-range precision strikes against high value targets, this tactical ballistic missile leaves the atmosphere before reentering on a steep trajectory, exceeding Mach 4 on impact. The Piledriver is virtually impossible to intercept without long range missile defenses in the vicinity of the target.
Designed for rapidly delivering vehicles: Designed for rapidly delivering vehicles from Annex class assault carriers to landing points, this fast hovercraft can carry up to 80 tons of cargo and is equipped with an IRM-S1 launcher and heavy machine gun for self defense.
Designed specifically for anti-armor app: Designed specifically for anti-armor applications, this short range fire-and-forget missile is ideal for penetrating well protected tanks from any angle.
Designed to supplement and eventually re: Designed to supplement and eventually replace human sentries, the pillbox represents part of a networked perimeter monitoring system. The hardened structure houses a pair of autonomous 12.7mm machine gun turrets.

Destroying a warhead storage facility, s: Destroying a warhead storage facility, such as a hardened shelter, warhead storage bunker or aircraft carrier, is an effective means of depleting the enemy's warhead supply.

Each aircraft is equipped with a distrib: Each aircraft is equipped with a distributed aperture optical detection system, which will scrutinize and identify contacts for you within approximately 5km depending on how powerful it is for a given aircraft.
Editing built-in mission. Saving will op: Editing built-in mission. Saving will open the Save Menu to create a copy
Effective against ground targets or slow: Effective against ground targets or slow-flying aircraft at ranges of up to 8km, the AGM-48 can maneuver erratically to make interception difficult.
Emitting radar lets you detect targets a: Emitting radar lets you detect targets at long distance, but can also give away your position. Planes equipped with radar can turn it on or off with the Toggle Radar keybind.
Engaging afterburner will increase your: Engaging afterburner will increase your risk of being hit by IR missiles, as it increases engine IR signature and reduces the relative effectiveness of flares.
Engaging auto-hover near a friendly ship: Engaging auto-hover near a friendly ship will match its speed so you can land on its deck easily.
Factory buildings supply your team with: Factory buildings supply your team with airframes that can be made available for free depending on your rank.

Featuring 8 IR missile launchers, this a: Featuring 8 IR missile launchers, this air defense system is capable of intercepting missiles and aircraft at a range of up to 5km
Featuring powerful engines, a stealthy s: Featuring powerful engines, a stealthy silhouette, and 4 large internal weapon bays, the SFB-81 Darkreach is a formidable bomber capable of deploying both conventional and nuclear weapons. Its blended wing design allows the Darkreach to conduct operations in a variety of flight regimes, from low-altitude penetrating strikes to standoff strategic bombardment.
Firing .50 caliber ammunition, the 12.7m: Firing .50 caliber ammunition, the 12.7mm machine gun is effective against aircraft and lightly armored surface targets at ranges of up to 1km (0.61 miles).
Firing 57mm proximity fused explosive sh: Firing 57mm proximity fused explosive shells, the Anvil is capable of dealing devastating volleys against both air and land targets
FlightHud enabled after it was destroyed: FlightHud enabled after it was destroyed
Fly a T/A-30 Compass on a ground attack: Fly a T/A-30 Compass on a ground attack mission. Use missiles, rockets, bombs and guns to destroy a BDF convoy of lightly defended vehicles.
Fly an SAH-46 Chicane under the radar to: Fly an SAH-46 Chicane under the radar to eliminate an enemy forward arming and refueling point.
Fly the A-19 Brawler in a demanding, hig: Fly the A-19 Brawler in a demanding, high tempo close air support mission as BDF narrowly defend Maris Airport against a massive PALA armoured assault.
Fly the SFB-81 Darkreach on a bombing mi: Fly the SFB-81 Darkreach on a bombing mission to destroy a PALA vehicle depot on a heavily defended airbase.
Fly the T/A-30 Compass in an intense dog: Fly the T/A-30 Compass in an intense dogfight - your side is outnumbered 8 to 5.
Flying 'Nap-of-the-earth' refers to usin: Flying 'Nap-of-the-earth' refers to using folds in the terrain such as valleys to hide from radar coverage.
Flying at subsonic speeds along a terrai: Flying at subsonic speeds along a terrain-hugging flight path, this cruise missile is difficult to detect and can overwhelm defenses in large numbers.
Funds donated during a match are split e: Funds donated during a match are split evenly between players on your team.
GPU does not support Target 4.5. Disabli: GPU does not support Target 4.5. Disabling Grass and other detail
Ground vehicles are produced by factorie: Ground vehicles are produced by factories, stored in each faction's inventory, and deployed from vehicle depots.
Guided thermonuclear bomb, set to strate: Guided thermonuclear bomb, set to strategic yield. Detonates after a minimum time delay of 16 seconds, when below 500m (1650ft) altitude. Unless being lofted, level bombing should be carried out at a minimum of 1300m(4300ft).
Guided thermonuclear bomb, set to tactic: Guided thermonuclear bomb, set to tactical yield. Detonates after a minimum time delay of 8 seconds, and when below 150m (500ft) altitude. For laydown delivery, it will deploy a parachute to allow the bomb to survive impact with the ground when dropped below 300m (1000ft).

Guided thermonuclear bomb, set to tactical yield. Detonates after a minimum time delay of 8 seconds, and when below 150m (500ft) altitude. For laydown delivery, it will deploy a parachute to allow the bomb to survive impact with the ground when dropped below 300m(1000ft).
Heading: Heading
Heavy duty tractor cab for hauling large: Heavy duty tractor cab for hauling large trailer systems
Heavy thermobaric guided bomb capable of: Heavy thermobaric guided bomb capable of devastating soft targets over a wide area. Best used against buildings or lightly defended groups of vehicles.
High-performance fighter aircraft such a: High-performance fighter aircraft such as the FS-12 Revoker, FS-20 Vortex, and KR-67 Ifrit have relaxed or negative stability, requiring the onboard fly-by-wire computer to keep the aircraft from tumbling out of control.
Holding the 'Flight Assist' button down: Holding the 'Flight Assist' button down for one second will toggle auto-hover in VTOL and STOVL aircraft.
How much of a reward goes back into the: How much of a reward goes back into the Faction HQ. A value of 100% means all money earned is redistributed by the faction, while a value of 0% means the player who earned the score keeps all of the money.
If taken above 16000m (52000ft) most eng: If taken above 16000m (52000ft) most engines will flame out.
If you don't want to use radial menus, y: If you don't want to use radial menus, you can instead bind each of the radial menu features to buttons on your keyboard or HOTAS.

Ignus Archipelago is situated on the Nor: Ignus Archipelago is situated on the Northwest Pacific Rim, and contains the prosperous city-state of Feldspar, as well as the dormant volcanic cone of Ignus Minor.
In a protracted fight, keeping your ship: In a protracted fight, keeping your ships supplied with missiles may make or break your chances at victory.
In preparation for a large air raid, use: In preparation for a large air raid, use the SAH-46 Chicane to neutralise several long range SAM systems.

It is possible to perform lay-down bombi: It is possible to perform lay-down bombing with a 250kt GPO-N by skidding it along the length of an enemy runway. This is neither safe, nor recommended.
It takes approximately 30 minutes to dri: It takes approximately 30 minutes to drive from Port Maris to Agrapol at the posted speed limit.

Jamming a ship's radar can greatly reduc: Jamming a ship's radar can greatly reduce the ability of its Close In Weapon Systems (CIWS) turrets to track and engage targets.

Landing lights on ships, such as on the: Landing lights on ships, such as on the Hyperion and Annex carrier classes, are directional so that they can only be seen from behind.
Large targets like enemy factories are b: Large targets like enemy factories are best destroyed with large munitions, such as bombs or cruise missiles.
Last chunk should be empty if under max: Last chunk should be empty if under max number of chunks
Launch from an aircraft carrier and tack: Launch from an aircraft carrier and tackle a diverse set of targets in a versatile aircraft.
Learn how to defeat semi-active radar ho: Learn how to defeat semi-active radar homing missiles. For this lesson you will be piloting the T/A-30 Compass trainer aircraft.
Learn how to designate targets and use m: Learn how to designate targets and use missiles to destroy them. For this lesson you will be piloting the T/A-30 Compass trainer aircraft.
Learn how to manage throttle, brake and: Learn how to manage throttle, brake and rudder to safely taxi to the runway, before conducting your first take off. For this lesson you will be piloting the T/A-30 Compass trainer aircraft.
Learn how to prepare for and perform a l: Learn how to prepare for and perform a landing. For this lesson you will be piloting the T/A-30 Compass trainer aircraft.
Learn how to use flares to defeat IR mis: Learn how to use flares to defeat IR missiles. For this lesson you will be piloting the T/A-30 Compass trainer aircraft.
Linking unit with SavedUnit before Netwo: Linking unit with SavedUnit before NetworkSpawn
LobbyCreated_t no HostLobbyCompletion ev: LobbyCreated_t no HostLobbyCompletion event, CreateLobby may have timed out before steam returned result

Locations are captured by having more ma: Locations are captured by having more manpower present than the enemy. The time it takes to capture depends on the balance of manpower from each side, as well as the number of buildings present at the location.
Logistics vehicle with a loading system: Logistics vehicle with a loading system capable of handling a variety of tasks
Long range air defense trailer capable o: Long range air defense trailer capable of engaging aerial targets detected by nearby radar trucks
Long range air defense unit capable of e: Long range air defense unit capable of engaging aerial targets detected by nearby radar trucks
Long range ground launched semi-active r: Long range ground launched semi-active radar homing missile
Long range launcher armed with a pair of: Long range launcher armed with a pair of 20kt Nuclear Piledrivers. Will deploy and fire automatically on known datalinked targets once the strategic escalation threshold is met.
Long range launcher armed with a pair of HE Piledrivers. Will deploy and fire automatically on known datalinked targets once the strategic escalation threshold is met.
Long-range air-to-air missile using a ra: Long-range air-to-air missile using a ramjet sustainer motor for beyond visual range (BVR) engagements. The AAM-36 takes approximately 20 seconds to reach a top speed of Mach 4.
Long-range anti-surface missile employin: Long-range anti-surface missile employing a quasi-ballistic trajectory, allowing it to reach distant targets at supersonic speeds.
Main battle tanks are heavily armoured,: Main battle tanks are heavily armoured, but can still be defeated by aerial 30mm cannon fire by shooting into the engine bay or through the rear or roof of the turret.
Map Unit in NetworkMap is missing MapUni: Map Unit in NetworkMap is missing MapUniqueName
MapBuilding.TakeDamage called but buildi: MapBuilding.TakeDamage called but buildingSet was not set
Medium range 127mm rocket with a laser g: Medium range 127mm rocket with a laser guidance package providing limited maneuverability. Launching aircraft must aim at the target and keep it selected to provide guidance.
Medium-range heat seeking missile ideal: Medium-range heat seeking missile ideal for attacking fast and maneuverable aircraft

Modular Support Vehicle carrying a Laser: Modular Support Vehicle carrying a Laser Air Defence System capable of destroying small calibre aerial munitions.

Mount is not in hardpointSet's options: Mount is not in hardpointSet's options
Multiplier for the money received when s: Multiplier for the money received when score is earned. A value of 100% means $1m for every point scored. Score is calculated as the square root of a unit's price, in millions.
Munitions containers hold large amounts: Munitions containers hold large amounts of explosives and must be handled with care to prevent accidental explosions which can damage your aircraft, as well as the units you are trying to resupply.

Naval Supply containers will float on wa: Naval Supply containers will float on water, and can be picked up by ships within 200m.
Navigation Lights can be set independant: Navigation Lights can be set independantly of your landing gear with a dedicated keybind. This is useful to form up with your wingmen and maintain formation during the night or low visibility conditions.

Number of warheads available to this fac: Number of warheads available to this faction
Objects not designed for supersonic flig: Objects not designed for supersonic flight will experience significantly more drag when exceeding their critical mach number.
Occupying three structural hardpoints an: Occupying three structural hardpoints and weighing in at 1.6 tons loaded, this seven-barrelled, twin motor behemoth fires a mixed belt of 30mm armour piercing incendiary & HE rounds at 3000rpm. Can be made effective against the majority of enemy vehicles, buildings, and slow moving aircraft.

OpenInventoryPanel called but no units h: OpenInventoryPanel called but no units had UnitStorage
Optically guided 250kg bomb capable of d: Optically guided 250kg bomb capable of destroying heavily armored vehicles and small buildings.
Optically guided 250kg bomb, fitted with: Optically guided 250kg bomb, fitted with range extension kit to allow it to glide over long distances.
Optically guided 500kg bomb, ideal for a: Optically guided 500kg bomb, ideal for attacking convoys and large buildings.
Outcome was in AllObjectives list but no: Outcome was in AllObjectives list but not in AllOutcomes

Prevent a column of vehicles from crossi: Prevent a column of vehicles from crossing the bridge to Boscali Island, before neutralizing the attack at its source.
Protected parking area for aircraft, shi: Protected parking area for aircraft, shielded from shrapnel
Radar and long range missiles form the b: Radar and long range missiles form the backbone of an air-defense network. Without them, aircraft can fly above short range systems with impunity.
Radar systems can struggle to see object: Radar systems can struggle to see objects flying very close to the ground. Cruise missiles exploit this.
Reduce AI Aircraft per friendly player: Reduce AI Aircraft per friendly player
Reducing your fuel load can significantl: Reducing your fuel load can significantly improve your aircraft's flight characteristics.
Refrigerated, in-ground bulk liquid gas: Refrigerated, in-ground bulk liquid gas storage. Thick concrete for insulation makes it difficult to damage with weapons fire.
Reinforced bunker for storing ammunition: Reinforced bunker for storing ammunition and nuclear warheads. Can resupply units within 300m. It is resistant to bombs and missiles, often requiring multiple direct hits or large/penetrating munitions to destroy it.
Reinforced bunker for storing ammunition and warheads. Can resupply units within 300m.
Reinforced hangar for storing small airc: Reinforced hangar for storing small aircraft, resistant to bombs and missiles
Reload same mission map 0 SECOND LOAD: Reload same mission map 0 SECOND LOAD

Ships are relatively unarmored, and have: Ships are relatively unarmored, and have large volumes of ammunition stored deep inside them. Sometimes even a single hit can be completely catastrophic.
Ships use red bridge lighting at night i: Ships use red bridge lighting at night in order to limit the ship's visibility and preserve the crew's night vision.
Short range 70mm rocket with a laser gui: Short range 70mm rocket with a laser guidance package providing limited maneuverability. Launching aircraft must aim at the target and keep it selected to provide guidance.
Short-range anti-tank guided missile des: Short-range anti-tank guided missile designed for knocking out vehicles, emplacements,  and small buildings
Short-range heat seeking missile ideal f: Short-range heat seeking missile ideal for attacking fast and maneuverable aircraft
Should not be applying timeout if player: Should not be applying timeout if player is already timeout
Showing password prompt to user because: Showing password prompt to user because lobby has password
Single-use container for replenishing a: Single-use container for replenishing a warship's ammunition stores. Has floatation devices and can be picked up by ships within 200m after being placed in the water.
Single-use pallet for replenishing a war: Single-use pallet for replenishing a warship's ammunition stores. Has floatation devices and can be picked up by ships within 200m after being placed in the water.
Skipping OnServerUpdated because of pend: Skipping OnServerUpdated because of pending refresh
Skipping RequestLobbyData because of pen: Skipping RequestLobbyData because of pending refresh
Skipping set mission because missions ar: Skipping set mission because missions are the same
Slower firing than its rotary counterpar: Slower firing than its rotary counterparts, the 27mm Autocannon packs a heavier punch and is effective against both aircraft and moderately armored surface targets.
Some SAM launchers, such as the R9 Strat: Some SAM launchers, such as the R9 Stratolance trailer, acquire their target using data provided by a nearby radar unit, such as a HLT Radar truck.
Spawning Player object for host and conn: Spawning Player object for host and connections
Sporting a powerful autocannon and anti-: Sporting a powerful autocannon and anti-armor missiles, the Linebreaker Infantry Fighting Vehicle is a versatile unit capable of engaging both air and ground threats
Square rampart to provide cover for vehi: Square rampart to provide cover for vehicles
Start Mission should not be called while: Start Mission should not be called while mission is null
Starting remote command server on port 7: Starting remote command server on port 7779
SteamManager.instance should be null whe: SteamManager.instance should be null when init is called
Stop called when network was not active: Stop called when network was not active
Subscribed Count was greater than max. C: Subscribed Count was greater than max. Clamping value
Successfully crash-landing a damaged air: Successfully crash-landing a damaged aircraft at a friendly airbase will both preserve the aircraft, and deny the enemy a kill.
Supplies fissile material for nuclear we: Supplies fissile material for nuclear weapons. Having an enrichment plant ensures a steady supply of nuclear warheads.
Support vehicle capable of rearming frie: Support vehicle capable of rearming friendly units within 300m
Suppression of Enemy Air Defense (SEAD): Suppression of Enemy Air Defense (SEAD) missions use a combination of anti-radiation missiles, glide bombs and electronic warfare to suppress and destroy radar units, SAM launchers and anti-air guns.
SyncMissionHeader should be the first pa: SyncMissionHeader should be the first part and only written once
Synthetic fuel production unit capable o: Synthetic fuel production unit capable of converting a large variety of organic feedstocks into fertilizer and combustible fuels.
TList of HardpointIndexes. if other hard: TList of HardpointIndexes. if other hardpoint has mount, then this must have no mount
Tanks can take a hull-down position usin: Tanks can take a hull-down position using field entrenchments, so that their hull is protected and only their turret is exposed to enemy fire.
Target destroyed changing to free cam: Target destroyed changing to free cam
Test 1a Passed: Short string handled cor: Test 1a Passed: Short string handled correctly.
Test 1b Passed: Short string handled cor: Test 1b Passed: Short string handled correctly.
Test 2 Passed: Long string split into mu: Test 2 Passed: Long string split into multiple chunks correctly.
Test 3 Passed: Long string correctly tru: Test 3 Passed: Long string correctly truncated to max length.
Test 4 Passed: String with special chara: Test 4 Passed: String with special characters handled correctly.
Test 5 Passed: Japanese text correctly s: Test 5 Passed: Japanese text correctly split into chunks under the 255-byte limit.
Test 6 Passed: Empty string handled corr: Test 6 Passed: Empty string handled correctly.
The 1.5kt GPO-N deploys a parachute to s: The 1.5kt GPO-N deploys a parachute to slow it down and enable laydown delivery at very low altitude and high speed.
The 20mm rotary cannon fires dual purpos: The 20mm rotary cannon fires dual purpose explosive shells, effective against aircraft or moderately armored surface targets.
The 25mm rotary cannon fires dual purpos: The 25mm rotary cannon fires dual purpose explosive shells, effective against aircraft or moderately armored surface targets.
The 30mm rotary cannon fires large, dual: The 30mm rotary cannon fires large, dual purpose explosive shells, effective against armored surface targets.
The 35mm Autocannon packs a heavier punc: The 35mm Autocannon packs a heavier punch than other aerial guns and is effective against many armored surface targets. Its superior ballistics allow it to remain effective at ranges exceeding 3000m.
The A-19 Brawler is a heavily armed and: The A-19 Brawler is a heavily armed and heavily armored dual prop-fan aircraft, specialized in Close Air Support missions. Its large weapon payload of bombs, missiles and rockets, as well as its dual 35mm autocannons make it a very dangerous threat to any enemy vehicle.
The AAM-36 Scimitar can reach a top spee: The AAM-36 Scimitar can reach a top speed of Mach 4 and hit aerial targets over 100km away, thanks to its ramjet engine, which makes it an excellent missile for Beyond Visual Range (BVR) engagements.
The AFV6 is a fast, lightweight multipur: The AFV6 is a fast, lightweight multipurpose armoured vehicle. This is a short range air-defence variant, with a potent 20mm rotary cannon and an IRM-S1 launcher.

The AFV6 is a fast, lightweight multipurpose armoured vehicle. This is an anti-armour variant, equipped with a large, long range multiple ATGM launcher. Internal stores of extra missiles reduce seating capacity substantially.

The AFV6 is a fast, lightweight multipurpose armoured vehicle. This is the default variant, an armoured personnel carrier. The increased seating capacity allows it to capture locations faster than other variants.
The AFV6 is a fast, lightweight multipurpose armoured vehicle. This variant is an infantry fighting vehicle with a 25mm cannon.
The AFV8 Armored Personnel Carrier is a: The AFV8 Armored Personnel Carrier is a fast troop transport with a roof mounted machine gun to counter low-flying aerial threats and soft ground targets
The AFV8 SAM and Linebreaker SAM launch: The AFV8 SAM and Linebreaker SAM launch IRM-S2 missiles, while the Hexhound SAM, LCV25 AA and AFV6 SAM launch shorter ranged IRM-S1 missiles.
The AFV8, used by the Boscali Defence Fo: The AFV8, used by the Boscali Defence Force, has a higher top speed on-road than the Linebreaker chassis favored by Primeva.
The AGM-68 is a large, optically guided: The AGM-68 is a large, optically guided missile capable of destroying structures and heavily armored vehicles. It follows an unpredictable trajectory to avoid interception.
The AGM-99 is a subsonic anti-ship cruis: The AGM-99 is a subsonic anti-ship cruise missile, with a supersonic terminal phase. It uses an evasive pattern as well as a random top attack to confuse its target air defenses.
The ALND-4 (Air Launched Nuclear Deterre: The ALND-4 (Air Launched Nuclear Deterrent) is a long range subsonic cruise missile carrying a tactical nuclear warhead.
The ARAD-116 is an anti-radiation missil: The ARAD-116 is an anti-radiation missile, designed to automatically detect and guide toward an enemy radar source. The missile's high speed and low radar cross-section helps it avoid interception.
The AShM-300 is a supersonic anti-ship c: The AShM-300 is a supersonic anti-ship cruise missile, using its high speed, low altitude, small radar cross section and an evasive pattern during its terminal phase to penetrate air defenses.
The AT-145 is a short-range anti-tank gu: The AT-145 is a short-range anti-tank guided missile designed for knocking out vehicles, emplacements and small buildings.
The Alkyon AB-4 is an advanced supersoni: The Alkyon AB-4 is an advanced supersonic bomber with electronic warfare capabilities, designed to stealthily deliver nuclear or conventional payloads onto high value targets. 4 afterburning engines combined with variable geometry wings provide incredible top speed and enough maneuverability to evade aerial threats. If critically damaged, a crew escape capsule allows for safe ejection at any altitude or airspeed.
The Annex Class Carrier can deploy OTB-3: The Annex Class Carrier can deploy OTB-31 Landing Craft, as well as VTOL and STOVL aircraft.
The Auger is a bunker busting gravity bo: The Auger is a bunker busting gravity bomb with a precision guidance kit. It is capable of penetrating hardened structures before its large warhead detonates.
The Brawler is a reliable and rugged pla: The Brawler is a reliable and rugged platform built to carry large quantities of precision weapons. Advanced propfan engines combine endurance with respectable speed, while redundant control surfaces, isolated engines, and heavy cockpit armor provide excellent survivability. The A-19 is in its element when attacking convoys of vehicles, distributed short-range air defenses, or vessels operating in coastal waters.
The CI-22 Cricket has an excellent optic: The CI-22 Cricket has an excellent optical detection system, and can spot targets from further away than other aircraft.
The Chicane has the capacity to rescue u: The Chicane has the capacity to rescue up to two pilots per sortie. Rescues give a point reward.
The Cursor class represents the vanguard: The Cursor class represents the vanguard of the BDF fleet. This littoral flight deck (LFD) is designed to rapidly deploy light VTOL aircraft from shallow waterways. It employs a small waterplane area twin hull for stability and speed, and mounts a variety of short-range defensive weapons including a laser air defense system.
The EW-25 Medusa is able to instantly id: The EW-25 Medusa is able to instantly identify the source of received radar signals and turn this information into a datalink contact.
The EW-25 is a short take-off, vertical: The EW-25 is a short take-off, vertical landing (STOVL) support aircraft with a variety of powerful electronic warfare systems. Able to triangulate radar positions, jam enemy radar installations, suppress air defences, and even shoot down missiles with a high energy laser, a single Medusa can easily turn the tide of a battle.
The FS-12 Revoker is built for agility a: The FS-12 Revoker is built for agility above all else, capable of extreme maneuvers at almost any speed. Internal weapon bays help reduce drag, allowing supersonic speeds even at low altitudes and with heavy payloads

The FS-12 Revoker is built for agility above all else, capable of extreme maneuvers at almost any speed. Internal weapon bays help reduce drag, allowing supersonic speeds even at low altitudes and with heavy payloads. While less stealthy than newer fighters, the Revoker remains a cost-effective means of establishing air superiority.
The FS-20 Vortex has a smaller Radar Cro: The FS-20 Vortex has a smaller Radar Cross Section (RCS) than other aircraft and has the ability to hover with its swivelling jet engine nozzle and lift fan.
The Hexhound is a bullet resistant 6x6 U: The Hexhound is a bullet resistant 6x6 UGV chassis. It has a top speed off-road of 50km/h and over 100km range on a single charge. Jailbroken versions can engage autonomously, removing the need for human oversight.
The High Energy Laser (HEL) is a trailer: The High Energy Laser (HEL) is a trailer-mounted emplacement that uses an 80kW laser turret to intercept munitions within a 6km radius.
The Hyperion Class Carrier is one of the: The Hyperion Class Carrier is one of the world's very few aircraft carriers designed and built solely for an export market.
The Hyperion class features a short take: The Hyperion class features a short take-off ramp and arrestor gear on its landing runway, and can accommodate a variety of aircraft types. Defended by two MMR-S3 batteries, one RAM-45 launcher, and two 30mm CIWS turrets, this fleet carrier is capable of countering most aerial threats.
The IRM-S1 is a man-portable air defense: The IRM-S1 is a man-portable air defense system (MANPADS) effective at countering air threats within 5km. An infrared homing seeker allows the missile to lock onto any aerial target with a heat signature.
The KR-67 Ifrit has side weapon bays (so: The KR-67 Ifrit has side weapon bays (sometimes referred to as 'heater bays') designed to accomodate a single IRM-S2 each.
The KR-67 Ifrit is manufactured under li: The KR-67 Ifrit is manufactured under license in Kramenka.
The LCV25 is a 4x4 all terrain vehicle,: The LCV25 is a 4x4 all terrain vehicle, offered in AA or AT configurations, combining the agility of a light recon vehicle with the firepower of heavier fighting vehicles. It is air transportable, with 2 units fitting inside the cargo bay of a VL-49 Tarantula.
The M12 Jackknife is a combat engineerin: The M12 Jackknife is a combat engineering vehicle uniquely developed for airborne troops to allow them to fortify remote locations. Its capacity as an engineering vehicle is also useful in maintaining and repairing airbase structures.
The M12 Jacknife is a combat engineering: The M12 Jacknife is a combat engineering vehicle uniquely developed for airborne troops to allow them to fortify remote locations. Its capacity as an engineering vehicle is also useful in maintaining and repairing airbase structures.
The M12 jacknife, despite only weighing: The M12 jacknife, despite only weighing 6 tons, is able to punch well above its weight as an earthmover by using its internal capacity as ballast.
The Medusa's laser's effectiveness is af: The Medusa's laser's effectiveness is affected by distance, and its maximum effective range is 15km. Shorter ranges however will enable it to deliver much more energy to a target.
The Modular Support Vehicle (MSV) series: The Modular Support Vehicle (MSV) series serves as the primary logistical and support asset of the PALA military, coming in various configurations from flatbed, to radar truck and a mobile fire control unit.
The PAB-250LR is a standard PAB-250 fitt: The PAB-250LR is a standard PAB-250 fitted with a glide kit, allowing the bomb to fly much further and reach distant targets. It still retains its rather large RCS.
The PAB-80LR is a glide bomb with a low: The PAB-80LR is a glide bomb with a low radar cross section. Depending on its release speed and altitude, it can glide very long distances, making it an efficient stand-off weapon.
The PAB-80LR is small enough to fit insi: The PAB-80LR is small enough to fit inside most aircraft weapon bays, which provides stealth aircraft with fit for purpose stand-off attack weapon.
The Radar Cross Section (RCS) of an airc: The Radar Cross Section (RCS) of an aircraft will decrease when it expends weapons on its external pylons.
The Radial Menu gives you access to seve: The Radial Menu gives you access to several actions relative to your aircraft and can be accessed by holding 'Radial Menu' keybind for 1s.
The Radome available for the Medusa is e: The Radome available for the Medusa is exceptionally powerful, and has practically no radar floor.
The SAH-46 Chicane is much better protec: The SAH-46 Chicane is much better protected against machine gun fire than other aircraft.
The SAH-46 Chicane retains a traditional: The SAH-46 Chicane retains a traditional attack helicopter configuation while incorporating upgrades that keep it a formidable presence on the battlefield of the late 21st Century. Cutting edge stealth technology allows the Chicane to conduct pop-up attacks from behind terrain and disappear from radar without a trace.
The SFB-81 Darkreach with a full load wi: The SFB-81 Darkreach with a full load will climb efficiently at an angle of 14 degrees.
The Shard Class Corvette has its search: The Shard Class Corvette has its search radar situated near the bridge. As a result, an anti-radiation missiles is able to deal catastrophic damage to them.
The Spearhead is PALA's Main Battle Tank: The Spearhead is PALA's Main Battle Tank, and is equipped with both a 130mm main gun and a GTG missile launcher. It is also equipped with a 20kW laser active protection system.
The T/A-30 Compass has many redundant co: The T/A-30 Compass has many redundant control surfaces, and can remain airborne with significant damage.
The TBM launcher is armed with twin Pile: The TBM launcher is armed with twin Piledriver missiles. They remain stowed until the strategic threshold is met, then engage high-value targets. Pilots should hunt the launchers down before activation to prevent nuclear devastation.
The Tusko-B is a supersonic stand-off mi: The Tusko-B is a supersonic stand-off missile, using a quasi-ballistic trajectory to reach its target at very high speed.
The UH-90 Ibis can carry two squads of i: The UH-90 Ibis can carry two squads of infantry in its cargo bay, which provide the aircraft with the ability to capture airbases.
The UH-90 Ibis is a medium sized utility: The UH-90 Ibis is a medium sized utility helicopter, with two contra-rotating coaxial rotors and push props. It can use its dual 40mm grenade launchers firing from its side windows to clear hot landing zones.
The Weapon Wheel gives you instant acces: The Weapon Wheel gives you instant access to all weapon stations on your aircraft and can be accessed by holding 'Weapon Wheel' keybind for 1s.
The amount of starting funds players rec: The amount of starting funds players receive when joining. This is paid from the faction funds, which can overdraw for this purpose.
The base rate of income players receive: The base rate of income players receive from the faction HQ. This value is per player. If the faction runs out of money, this income will stop.
The blast radius of a nuclear weapon is: The blast radius of a nuclear weapon is proportional to the cubic root of its yield.
The engine of your aircraft can be stopp: The engine of your aircraft can be stopped and started mid-flight with a dedicated keybind or a radial menu action. This is necessary for emergency landing with helicopters, in order to enter auto-rotation.
The fire suppression system will automat: The fire suppression system will automatically contain engine fires, but a fuel fire outside the engine can spread and consume an aircraft.
The forward and rear areas of the SFB-81: The forward and rear areas of the SFB-81 Darkreach's inner weapon bays can be combined to accommodate large missiles, or used separately for more varied loadouts.
The impact angle of a projectile can det: The impact angle of a projectile can determine how effectively it penetrates an armoured target.
The large cargo bay of the VL-49 Tarantu: The large cargo bay of the VL-49 Tarantula can contain a single AFV6, 2 containers or 2 Demolition Bombs.
The percentage of funds above the <b>Exc: The percentage of funds above the Excess Funds Threshold (initially the starting balance) that is distributed alongside regular income.
The pods for AGR-18 Lynchpins are not ra: The pods for AGR-18 Lynchpins are not rated for supersonic flight.
The pool of starting funds, from which r: The pool of starting funds, from which regular incomes and join allocations are drawn from. Player donations, contribution, and kill rewards from AI units go back into this pool. If the pool exceeds the starting amount, the excess is split amongst the current players.
The rotor blades on the SAH-46 Chicane a: The rotor blades on the SAH-46 Chicane and the UH-90 Ibis will flex under load.
The speed of sound is approximately 340: The speed of sound is approximately 340 m/s (1100 ft/s) at sea level, decreasing to 295 m/s (970 ft/s) above 11,000m (36,000 ft).
The trailer-mounted Counter Rocket and M: The trailer-mounted Counter Rocket and Mortar system (CRAM) can intercept munitions within 2.5km radius around a strategic target with its 20mm rotary gun shooting at 4500 rpm.
The wing-mounted offensive jammers on th: The wing-mounted offensive jammers on the Medusa can blind up to one radar each, or be focused on fewer targets to increase their effective range.
There are no operational hangars at this: There are no operational hangars at this airbase
This 500kg long range glide bomb is mean: This 500kg long range glide bomb is meant for standoff attacks against large buildings, using optical sensor for terminal guidance.
This SteamManager instance was already i: This SteamManager instance was already initialized
This air launched anti-ship missile has: This air launched anti-ship missile has a very low altitude cruise profile with a pop-up terminal attack mode designed to penetrate ship defenses.
This anti-radiation missile will lock on: This anti-radiation missile will lock on to radar emissions after launch, making it ideal for attacking SAM sites at beyond visual range.
This anti-ship cruise missile can be lau: This anti-ship cruise missile can be launched from aircraft or vertically by the Dynamo class Destroyer, using sea-skimming technique and supersonic speeds to penetrate the enemy's air defense systems.
This anti-ship cruise missile can be launched vertically by the Dynamo class Destroyer, using sea-skimming technique and supersonic speeds to penetrate the enemy's air defense systems.
This anti-ship missile has a very low al: This anti-ship missile has a very low altitude cruise profile with a pop-up terminal attack mode designed to penetrate ship defenses. Can be deployed from aircraft or launched from an Argus Class Frigate.
This armored air defense vehicle combine: This armored air defense vehicle combines off-road mobility with 12 short-range IR missiles capable of engaging low-flying aircraft
This compact warship is well equipped fo: This compact warship is well equipped for defending coastal areas, armed with a 57mm cannon, 20mm point defense system, and battery of vertically launched RAM-45 missiles. A small landing pad at the stern allows it to serve as a mobile re-arming and refueling point for helicopters.
This computer stabilized turret fires du: This computer stabilized turret fires dual purpose 20mm rounds, effective against aircraft or lighly armored surface targets at relatively short ranges
This formidable anti-air unit incorporat: This formidable anti-air unit incorporates a radar capable of tracking multiple aerial targets at a range of up to 15km, and carries 16 vertical-launch missiles which can be fired in rapid succession
This glide bomb deploys folding wings, g: This glide bomb deploys folding wings, giving it an extended range from altitude. Guided by an optical seeker during the terminal phase, the PAB-80LR features a small radar cross-section and no IR signature.
This guided missile destroyer is armed w: This guided missile destroyer is armed with a battery of vertically launched cruise missiles and a 155mm railgun in its forward turret. Its powerful defensive armament of two MMR-S3 batteries, three R9 vertical launchers and four 30mm CIWS turrets, makes the Dynamo class a powerful warship, able to defend a fleet from any threat.
This gun shoots 30mm explosive shells ef: This gun shoots 30mm explosive shells effective against armored ground vehicles and buildings at ranges of over 2km (1.3m).
This is a short description that should: This is a short description that should fit easily into a single chunk.
This manually aimed static air defense p: This manually aimed static air defense position is a simple and low-cost means of defending point targets from helicopters and other low-flying aircraft. Its small size and low profile make it difficult to spot from a distance.
This modified AGM-48 replaces the missil: This modified AGM-48 replaces the missile's usual warhead with a panoramic optical sensor suite capable of detecting enemy targets and registering them as contacts on faction datalink
This rotary cannon fires 20mm explosive: This rotary cannon fires 20mm explosive shells at 6000 rounds per minute, making it highly effective against aerial targets.
This self-propelled anti-aircraft gun sp: This self-propelled anti-aircraft gun sports twin 30mm autocannons firing proximity-fused shells, capable of accurately striking fast-moving targets at ranges of over 4000m
This trailer is equipped with a 20mm rot: This trailer is equipped with a 20mm rotary gun to provide point defence against shells, missiles, bombs, and low flying aircraft.
This transportable air defense missile l: This transportable air defense missile launcher capable of engaging aerial targets within 15km. It can be deployed by a utility aircraft and obtains target info from a nearby radar.
This transportable air defense radar uni: This transportable air defense radar unit can track multiple targets at ranges of up to 17km. It can be deployed by a utility aircraft and is able to provide target info to nearby SAM batteries.
This upfit for the AFV8 chassis features: This upfit for the AFV8 chassis features a 25mm cannon and anti-armor missile launcher, turning it into a fast infantry fighting vehicle.
Though lightly armed and armored, the LC: Though lightly armed and armored, the LCV45 is a fast vehicle ideal for forward scouting

To help gamepad users access all the gam: To help gamepad users access all the game's features, we've added two radial menus. If using default control bindings, these can be accessed by holding D-Pad Left or Right. If you want to use radial menus and have modified the default control bindings, you will need to reset them to default from Settings > Controls > Control Bindings.

Up until recently in their history, Bosc: Up until recently in their history, Boscali and Primeva were long-standing trade partners.
Upon arrival within 2.5km (1.6mi) of the: Upon arrival within 2.5km (1.6mi) of the designated target, this 500kg glide bomb dispenses 12 GS25 submunitions capable of independently finding and targeting hostile units in the vicinity.

Use the Alkyon AB-4 to penetrate heavy e: Use the Alkyon AB-4 to penetrate heavy enemy air defences and strike a BDF naval base.
Use the FS-12 Revoker to intercept a vol: Use the FS-12 Revoker to intercept a volley of cruise missiles launched at your base from Primeva.
Use various SEAD/DEAD abilities unique t: Use various SEAD/DEAD abilities unique to the EW-25 Medusa to facilitate an attack against a heavily defended ammo dump.
Using a combination of inertial guidance: Using a combination of inertial guidance and terminal radar homing, the Scythe can engage aerial targets at beyond visual range
Utility aircraft, such as the UH-90 Ibis: Utility aircraft, such as the UH-90 Ibis and VL-49 Tarantula, can use a cargo hook to transport ground units to their desired location without needing to land.

Vortex Ring State is a dangerous aerodyn: Vortex Ring State is a dangerous aerodynamic condition where a rotor disc stops producing lift due to ingesting its own downwash. It is best escaped from by applying full power and moving laterally.

Weapons stored on external hardpoints wi: Weapons stored on external hardpoints will increase the Radar Cross Section (RCS) of an aircraft.
While the Type 12 may be a legacy design: While the Type 12 may be a legacy design, it still remains a formidable presence on the battlefield. It offers better protection per unit weight than its contemporaries, owing to its novel monocoque composite hull & turret that give the Type-12 its signature shape. Its armament consists of a 130mm cannon firing hypervelocity SABOT rounds and a turreted 12.7mm machine gun.
With a liberal application of armour and: With a liberal application of armour and weapon modules, the latest iterations of the Spearhead are as protected as they are powerful. The combination of 130mm main gun and ATGM launcher allow it to hold its own against larger numbers of enemy armoured units, while the roof mounted 20kw pulse laser can protect the relatively thinner top armour against missiles. Its ever-growing list of capabilities has come with a diminished top speed and a total weight far exceeding its original design specifications.

You can issue movement orders to friendl: You can issue movement orders to friendly ground units by selecting them on the map, and then right clicking where you want them to go to.
You can keep your head pointed at a sing: You can keep your head pointed at a singular target by pressing 'Center View' when the 'Target Padlock' option is enabled.
You can order manned turrets on your air: You can order manned turrets on your aircraft to Hold fire by pressing and holding the 'Next Weapon' button.
